creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Hello,

I am the author of alfio, I wrote it a few years ago and completely forgot about it. The repository is gone since I deleted my GitHub account almost two years ago, which I have recreated only recently.

Unfortunately, I have no copy of the software left on my disks. But maybe I am able to retrieve it from some old FreeBSD package.

I am going to try and let you know.

Thanks for your interest and for reminding me about it.
